/Users/talibackend/Desktop/Projects/brim.content:
services:
  postgres:
    image: pgvector/pgvector:pg16
    container_name: pg
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
      POSTGRES_DB: testdb
    ports:
      - "5433:5432"
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data

volumes:
  pgdata:
/Users/talibackend/Desktop/Projects/brim.description: A Docker Compose file defining a single postgres service (pgvector/pg16) with environment variables, port mapping (5433:5432), and a named volume (pgdata).

Defines and exports a configured autonomous 'Super Agent' with memory, model settings, and browser automation tools.
Creates and exports a configured Mastra instance with storage, vectors, a Pino logger, and a supervisor agent.
Defines and exports an MCPClient instance configured to run a 'browser-use' server process (uvx) with OPENAI_API_KEY taken from environment.
